scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] P-Asserted-Identity: "Invite" <sip:Invite@avaya.com> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 a=sendrecv m=audio 50134 RTP/AVP 104 110 9 102 108 8 0 18 105 100 b=AS:137 b=RS:612 b=RR:1837 a=rtpmap:104 AMR-WB/16000 a=fmtp:104 mode-change-capability=2 a=rtpmap:110 AMR-WB/16000 a=fmtp:110 octet-align=1; mode-change-capability=2 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:102 AMR/8000 a=fmtp:102 mode-change-capability=2 a=rtpmap:108 AMR/8000 a=fmtp:108 octet-align=1; mode-change-capability=2 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=rtpmap:105 telephone-event/16000 a=fmtp:105 0-15 a=rtpmap:100 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:100 0-15 a=maxptime:40 a=sendrecv t=0 0

PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Rack: 1 1 INVITE Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
